steps.title: Locate the onetime passcodes percentages in the table
steps.content: The row labeled “Onetime passcodes” shows the percentage of participants in each country who chose this method: UK = 16%, Japan = 8%, India = 25%. These are the three data points we need to compare.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The question asks which group viewed onetime passcodes as most secure. The highest percentage for onetime passcodes is 25%, from India. This means the sentence should be completed with the choice naming India. The other two countries have lower percentages (UK 16%, Japan 8%), so they do not best answer the question about which group viewed the method as most secure.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
